name: codex-media-canvas
description: Codex Media Canvas is an open-source multimodal canvas plugin for selecting, annotating, generating, and tracing image/video assets through Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Point at images or video frames, ask Codex to generate, and trace every version.
interface.longDescription: Codex Media Canvas stores visual context, local assets, annotations, queued requests, and version metadata while Codex handles conversation, Skills, provider orchestration, and generated outputs.
defaultPrompt: Continue processing Codex Media Canvas requests.
Use Product Marketing Set mode for the selected asset.
Revise the selected image or video frame according to its annotations.
